stories.headline: 100+ Crypto Firms Pressure Senate to Mark Up Clarity Act or Risk Enforcement Revival
stories.tldr: A coalition led by Coinbase and Ripple sent a letter demanding the Senate Banking Committee advance the Clarity Act market-structure bill immediately.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Without statutory rails locked in before recess, the industry fears a swing back to regulation-by-enforcement under a future administration.
the_details: Letter signed by over 100 firms urges an immediate markup to codify the SEC/CFTC jurisdictional split over digital assets.
Industry explicitly cites Biden-era enforcement cases as the precedent it wants foreclosed by statute, not agency discretion.
Follows the March 17 joint SEC-CFTC 68-page interpretive release laying out a token taxonomy across commodities, collectibles and securities.

stories.headline: April Crypto Theft Hits $606M in 18 Days, Worst Month Since Bybit February 2025 Breach
stories.tldr: Lazarus Group is linked to about 95% of April losses, with the $292M Kelp DAO and $285M Drift exploits dominating the total so far.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Cross-chain bridges and Solana perps are concentrating systemic risk just as DeFi TVL approaches cycle highs again.
the_details: Year-to-date 2026 theft now roughly $771.8M across 47 incidents, 3.7x larger than all of Q1 combined.
Lazarus attributed to both the Apr 1 Drift ($285M) and Apr 19 Kelp DAO ($292M) attacks by on-chain investigators.
Secondary April victims include CoW Swap, Zerion, Rhea Finance and Silo Finance across multiple chains.

stories.headline: Blockchain Capital Targets $700M Across Two New Funds as 2026 VC Window Reopens
stories.tldr: The crypto-focused VC is raising two vehicles totaling $700 million, per Bloomberg, signaling LP appetite is back after the 2025 whipsaw.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A fresh top-tier close sets a valuation floor for early-stage rounds and pulls capital back into infrastructure bets.
the_details: Two-fund structure implies dedicated vehicles for early-stage bets and opportunistic follow-on checks.
Raise follows Pantera's framing of 2025 as a 'capitulation year' setting up a 2026 rebound in altcoins.
Target size would place Blockchain Capital among the largest 2026 crypto VC closes announced to date.

stories.headline: Ramp and Privy Ship USDT With 1:1 On- and Off-Ramps on Solana, Plasma and Ethereum
stories.tldr: Ramp rolled out native USDT onramps across Solana, Plasma and Ethereum with 1:1 USD conversion, wiring embedded wallets straight to fiat.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Killing the USDC-to-USDT swap step removes friction for the stablecoin most used by non-US retail traders.
the_details: Privy announced the integration Tuesday, April 21, targeting apps built on its embedded-wallet SDK.
Plasma's inclusion flags the new stablecoin-focused L1's rapid move into mainstream payment rails.
1:1 offramp support lets users exit USDT directly to bank accounts without an intermediate bridging step.

stories.headline: Solana Loses $88 Support, Tests $85 as Altcoins Slide 2-3% on Rising BTC Dominance
stories.tldr: SOL trades at $85.74, down 2.49%, leading top-10 losers even as Solana holds 41% of Q1 DEX volume and leads dApp revenue five weeks running.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A price-fundamentals gap this wide usually closes violently, either via a BTC pause that lets alts catch up or a deeper SOL drawdown.
the_details: Bitcoin dominance at 58.1% and rising is pulling liquidity out of altcoin pairs.
Solana has led all chains in dApp revenue for five consecutive weeks despite the price slide.
Ethereum off 1.98% same session; total crypto market cap still up 1.9% to $2.7T on BTC strength.
